bleota_begin_auto.message0: start BLE OTA with device name %1
bleota_begin_auto.tooltip: Create the default BLE server, add the BLEOTA service, start advertising, and process updates automatically in loop

bleota_setup.message0: configure BLE OTA object %1 server %2 device name %3 secure mode %4
bleota_setup.tooltip: Create the BLEOTA object and BLE server, then call begin; secure mode requires setting the public key before starting the service

bleota_set_public_key.message0: BLE OTA %1 set RSA public key %2
bleota_set_public_key.tooltip: Set the RSA-2048 public key content for secure BLE OTA

bleota_set_device_info.message0: BLE OTA %1 set device info %2 to %3
bleota_set_device_info.tooltip: Set the model, version, or manufacturer field exposed through the Device Information Service

bleota_start_service.message0: start BLE OTA %1 server %2 scan response %3 auto restart after update %4
bleota_start_service.tooltip: Initialize the BLEOTA service, add it to advertising, and automatically handle connection and update processing in loop

bleota_process.message0: process BLE OTA %1 auto restart after update %2
bleota_process.tooltip: Manually call BLEOTA.process to handle receiving, verification, flash writing, and callback queue processing

bleota_abort.tooltip: Abort the current BLE OTA write operation

bleota_is_running.tooltip: Return whether OTA data is currently being received and written

bleota_progress.tooltip: Return the current OTA write progress percentage, or 0 before an update starts

bleota_uuid.tooltip: Return the BLE OTA GATT service UUID for custom advertising

bleota_on_events.tooltip: Register BLE OTA lifecycle callbacks for custom code before and after updates
